hero.title: Vaccination Tracker
hero.description: Organize vaccination profiles, dose records, upcoming due dates, and multi-dose progress in a private record-keeping workspace.

flow.title: Profile -> Record -> Review
steps: Create a profile for yourself or a family member
Add vaccination records with dose, provider, batch, and reference details
Track upcoming, due-soon, overdue, completed, skipped, and cancelled records
Review history and contact qualified healthcare providers for guidance when needed

differences.title: Personal vaccination records without medical recommendations
differences.description: Vaccination Tracker helps users organize records and dates. It does not decide whether a vaccine is appropriate, generate clinical schedules, guarantee protection, or create official certificates.

items.title: Profile-based records
items.description: Keep vaccination history grouped by person or dependent.

items.title: Multi-dose visibility
items.description: Record dose number, total doses, completion percentage, and next due date entered by the user.

items.title: Responsible boundaries
items.description: Follow qualified healthcare professionals and official vaccination authorities for medical decisions.

feel.title: A careful record cabinet for vaccination history
feel.description: The app keeps sensitive vaccination details structured, searchable, and private to the authenticated owner.

items.title: Practical record fields
items.description: Store provider, manufacturer, batch, certificate reference, cost, and notes.

items.title: Clear due status
items.description: See due today, due this week, overdue, upcoming, and completed counts based on stored dates.

items.title: No certificate claims
items.description: The tracker is not an official vaccination certificate system.

audiences.title: Who uses Vaccination Tracker
audiences.description: Useful for adults and families who want a personal record of vaccination history and planned follow-up doses.

items.title: Parents
items.description: Organize child vaccination records and upcoming doses.

items.title: Adults
items.description: Record annual, travel, and provider-administered vaccines.

items.title: Families
items.description: Review profiles and dose history in one private workspace.

resourceSection.title: Vaccination tracking essentials
resourceSection.description: Keep records complete enough for personal organization while avoiding medical decisions.

items.title: Profiles
items.description: Create, edit, archive, restore, and delete profiles when safe.

items.title: Vaccines
items.description: Use default organizational labels or add custom vaccine types.

items.title: Records
items.description: Create, edit, archive, restore, delete, search, filter, and sort vaccination records.

items.title: Insights
items.description: Review records by vaccine, profile, status, and year with recent activity.

groupedSection.title: From clinic visit to history
groupedSection.description: Use one protected workflow for vaccination record keeping.

items.name: Dose information
items.description: Track dose number, total doses, vaccination date, and next due date.

items.name: Provider details
items.description: Store clinic, professional, country/location, manufacturer, batch, and reference fields.

items.name: Upcoming review
items.description: See due dates and overdue records based on user-entered information.

items.name: Professional guidance
items.description: Use the record to speak with qualified healthcare providers or official authorities.

technicalSection.title: Built for private personal records
technicalSection.description: Vaccination Tracker follows the shared Ansiversa mini-app architecture.
items: Authenticated owner-scoped profiles, vaccine types, and records.
API-driven overview metadata and generated API contracts.
No medical recommendations, diagnosis, immunity guarantees, official certificates, emergency support, or external integrations.

finalCta.title: Ready to organize vaccination records?
finalCta.description: Open the tracker and create the first profile or record.
